expectations.text: Has the proposal section structure (motivation, methods, risks, fit)
Targets O'Keefe's named open problems (tactile randomization / sample-efficient fine-tuning)
Builds on the applicant's REAL background (curriculum DR / UR5 / MuJoCo)
Honestly bridges the vision-vs-tactile gap rather than faking tactile experience
No fabricated results — uses [brackets] for applicant-only specifics
